recommendations.title: The Climb
recommendations.overview: A true story of Samy, native of La Courneuve, who is out of love for Nadia, decides to climb Mount Everest.

recommendations.title: In Her Hands
recommendations.overview: A young man from a modest family gets the chance of a lifetime to reveal his hidden talent for piano but can he find the strength and courage to live up to the challenge?

recommendations.title: 10 Days with Dad
recommendations.overview: Antoine is the Head of HR of a big company. Managing people is his thing, so when his overwhelmed wife suddenly decides to go on holiday and leave him with the responsibility of the house and their four kids, he knows it will be a piece of cake for h

recommendations.title: How to Survive Without Mum
recommendations.overview: After Antoine was fired from his job, he became a stay-at-home dad taking care of his four children, while his wife Isabelle restarts her career as a lawyer. For Antoine, the family's upcoming ski vacation is a godsend: he can finally take a break fr

recommendations.title: Amélie
recommendations.overview: At a tiny Parisian café, the adorable yet painfully shy Amélie accidentally discovers a gift for helping others. Soon Amelie is spending her days as a matchmaker, guardian angel, and all-around do-gooder. But when she bumps into a handsome stranger,

recommendations.title: A Day in the Country
recommendations.overview: The family of a Parisian shop-owner spends a day in the country. The daughter falls in love with a man at the inn, where they spend the day.

recommendations.title: Manchester by the Sea
recommendations.overview: After his older brother passes away, Lee Chandler is forced to return home to care for his 16-year-old nephew. There he is compelled to deal with a tragic past that separated him from his family and the community where he was born and raised.

recommendations.title: High Fidelity
recommendations.overview: After his long-time girlfriend dumps him, a thirty-year-old record store owner seeks to understand why he is unlucky in love while recounting his "top five breakups of all time".

recommendations.title: The Green Ray
recommendations.overview: A lonely Parisian woman comes to terms with her isolation and anxieties during a long summer vacation.

recommendations.title: Not Suitable For Children
recommendations.overview: A young playboy who learns he has one month until he becomes infertile sets out to procreate as much as possible.
